Override.dn: Tattoo of the Kitava Blood Drinker

Overrides.Override: 0.5% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
20% reduced bonuses gained from Equipped Boots 20% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Gloves Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Bound

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Kraken Pole Lathi Unique ID: 184965ce8d59b56efb70b8f745b9cb0dbb9b5479cec72094f794723fb37fdaa7 Shaper Item Elder Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-B-R-R-R LevelReq: 76 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}1% increased Critical Strike Chance per 4% Quality +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Endurance Charge on Melee Stun Socketed Skills deal 20% more Attack Damage 1% increased Spell Damage per 10 Strength {crafted}Can have up to 3 Crafted Modifiers {crafted}+24 to Strength and Intelligence {crafted}20% increased Attack Speed {crafted}23% increased Critical Strike Chance

Rarity: UNIQUE Cinderswallow Urn Silver Flask Unique ID: e49695aac9796f3cfd5ad95a0c4397c3ccccdb58e789111e888e11d93266dcd3 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 27 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full +19 to Maximum Charges Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse 15% of Damage Taken from Hits is Leeched as Life during Effect Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 8% increased Damage Recover 2% of Life when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
